cmd:
K=$(grep -E '^N8N_API_KEY=' /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env | tail -1 | cut -d= -f2-)
python3 - "$K" << 'PYEOF'
import json,sys,urllib.request,urllib.error,time
K=sys.argv[1]; B='https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/'; WID='1YdXnLFOXI85IsWv'
def GET(w): return json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(B+w,headers={'X-N8N-API-KEY':K}),timeout=40))
d=GET(WID)
open('/root/wf-backup-dash-sticky.json','w').write(json.dumps(d))
old_th='<th style="padding:8px">'
new_th='<th style="padding:8px;position:sticky;top:0;background:#fff;z-index:3;border-bottom:1px solid #d8d6cd">'
old_sort="String(delDate(a)||'9999').localeCompare(String(delDate(b)||'9999'))"
new_sort="String(relDate(a)||'9999-99-99').localeCompare(String(relDate(b)||'9999-99-99'))"
old_scr='<td colspan="17" style="padding:7px 10px;background:#EEF1FB;'
new_scr='<td colspan="17" style="scroll-margin-top:48px;padding:7px 10px;background:#EEF1FB;'
patched=False
for n in d['nodes']:
    if n.get('type')=='n8n-nodes-base.code':
        c=(n.get('parameters') or {}).get('jsCode','')
        if 'work-start' in c:
            c1=c.replace(old_th,new_th); n1=c.count(old_th)
            c2=c1.replace(old_sort,new_sort); n2=c1.count(old_sort)
            c3=c2.replace(old_scr,new_scr); n3=c2.count(old_scr)
            print('replacements: th=%d sort=%d scroll=%d'%(n1,n2,n3))
            if n1>=1 and n3>=1:
                n['parameters']['jsCode']=c3; patched=True
print('patched:',patched)
if patched:
    payload={'name':d['name'],'nodes':d['nodes'],'connections':d['connections'],'settings':d.get('settings',{})}
    if d.get('staticData') is not None: payload['staticData']=d['staticData']
    body=json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
    try:
        r=urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(B+WID,data=body,method='PUT',headers={'X-N8N-API-KEY':K,'Content-Type':'application/json'}),timeout=40); print('PUT',r.status)
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e: print('PUT ERR',e.code,e.read()[:300])
    try:
        urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(B+WID+'/activate',method='POST',headers={'X-N8N-API-KEY':K}),timeout=20); print('activate ok')
    except Exception as e: print('activate err')
    d2=GET(WID)
    ok=any('position:sticky' in (x.get('parameters') or {}).get('jsCode','') for x in d2['nodes'] if x.get('type')=='n8n-nodes-base.code')
    print('verify sticky present:',ok,'| active:',d2.get('active'))
PYEOF
